title: Disney - Alice In Wonderland - Ceramic Blue / Beige Mushroom Trinket Box Officially Licensed Product - Mad Hatter, Tweedle Dum & Dee, White Rabbit, Queen Of Hearts & Alice. H:10 x W: 10 x D:11cm.
features: Officially Licensed Disney Collectible – This Alice in Wonderland Mushroom Trinket Box is an officially licensed product, making it a must-have for passionate Disney superfans who appreciate authentic, high-quality memorabilia.

Exquisite Ceramic Craftsmanship – Beautifully crafted from ceramic in soft blue and beige hues, this trinket box highlights the iconic mushroom from the story, symbolising its importance in Alice's whimsical journey, while adding a touch of elegance to any space.

Original and Contemporary Design – With a unique and modern design, this trinket box seamlessly merges contemporary style with the timeless magic of Alice in Wonderland, offering both charm and practicality for storing small treasures.

Part of an Enchanting Disney Collection – This trinket box is part of a wider collection that includes coasters, photo frames, candles, and more, allowing Disney enthusiasts to curate a cohesive, magical theme throughout their home, celebrating their love for the beloved fantasy tale.
description: Product Description Widdop & Co - Officially Licensed Alice In Wonderland Range. Transport your table to the fantastical world of Alice In Wonderland with the officially licensed tea party range from Widdop & Co. Everything Needed For A Magical Occasion. Brimming with originality and contemporary design, these items come together as part of a much larger, enchanting collection. The range includes beautifully crafted photo frames, elegant candles, stylish vases, and a variety of other captivating pieces, all designed to create a cohesive and magical theme. Perfect for Disney enthusiasts, this collection brings the beloved world of Disney into the home, offering fans a chance to surround themselves with charming and thoughtfully designed items that celebrate the magic and wonder of their favourite characters and stories. High Quality Products For High Quality Parties. Expertly crafted from ceramic and finished with a beautiful light blue glaze, this range is a tribute to the enchanting fantasy tale. Featuring stunning character illustrations, it captures the magic of the story in every detail, making it a true celebration of the beloved narrative. These pieces will undoubtedly last you for many magical parties to come. Disney - Alice in Wonderland - Ceramic Teapot - Alice, Mad Hatter & Roses Mot...
